exampleSentencesTranslated: He is always on time for work every morning.
I want you to always remember to call the family.
Good friends will always help each other in difficult times.
notes_md:
**luôn luôn** = *always*, 100% of the time. It shows something happens again and again without exception.

It’s an adverb, so it goes before the main verb to describe frequency. It emphasizes consistency more strongly than just **luôn** (which already means “always”).


Close synonym: **luôn** (shorter, more common in speech). Opposite: **không bao giờ** = never.

translation.en: I always ask you to do that.

content.sentence: Tôi ___ yêu cầu bạn làm điều đó.

exampleSentences: Anh ấy luôn luôn đi làm đúng giờ mỗi buổi sáng.
Chị muốn em luôn luôn nhớ gọi về cho gia đình nhé.
Bạn bè tốt sẽ luôn luôn giúp đỡ nhau khi gặp khó khăn.

translation.en: I always ask you to do that.

content.sentence: Tôi ___ yêu cầu bạn làm điều đó.

definitions.vi: Trong mọi lúc; vào mọi dịp.
definitions.en: At all times; on every occasion.
definitions.es: En todo momento; en cada ocasión.

example.vi: Tôi luôn luôn học bài mỗi ngày.

notes:
luôn luôn = always, 100% of the time. It shows something happens again and again without exception.

It’s an adverb, so it goes before the main verb to describe frequency. It emphasizes consistency more strongly than just luôn (which already means “always”).

Close synonym: luôn (shorter, more common in speech). Opposite: không bao giờ = never.
